name: Agentic Memory
description: Shared memory runtime and optional context engine for OpenClaw.

backendUrl.label: Backend URL
backendUrl.help: Agentic Memory backend URL that exposes the /openclaw endpoints.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Bearer token for the Agentic Memory backend. Prefer OpenClaw env interpolation such as ${AGENTIC_MEMORY_API_KEY}.

workspaceId.label: Workspace ID
workspaceId.help: Shared memory workspace identifier used across devices.

deviceId.label: Device ID
deviceId.help: Stable identifier for the current device.

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: Stable identifier for the current OpenClaw agent.

projectId.label: Project ID
projectId.help: Optional project identifier used to bias retrieval.

contextEngineId.label: Context Engine ID
contextEngineId.help: Context engine id to register with OpenClaw. Defaults to agentic-memory.
